ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of a single unit of the product */,
  "sales_tax_rate" REAL /* Sales tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category ID for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier ID for the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image URL for the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of a single unit of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program ID for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment gateway used for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_payment_gateway_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_gateway_id") REFERENCES payment_gateways ("payment_gateway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being shipped */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_inventories_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateways" (
  "payment_gateway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway */,
  "payment_gateway_type" TEXT /* Type of the payment gateway (e.g., PayPal, Stripe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_gateway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "shipping_method_type" TEXT /* Type of the shipping method (e.g., USPS, FedEx) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the warehouse */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "loyalty_program_type" TEXT /* Type of the loyalty program (e.g., points, rewards) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)
